S.FORM: Jerrelle Benimon hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1991, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 8, Jerrelle Benimon, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *errelle ő≤enimon ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa pzjaŇč pkaki Ē taj ks~…ēka Ē. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, *errelle ő≤enimon, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
